query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.role, c.managedProgramId, c.isActive, c.canLogin 
FROM consultors c 
WHERE c.role = 'gerente' 
ORDER BY c.id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, c.role, c.managedProgramId, c.isActive, c.canLogin 
FROM consultors c 
WHERE c.role = 'gerente' 
ORDER BY c.id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
